shakshi: Ring of Greed cleared — Mammon's domain traversed, token granted
Ring of Envy cleared — Leviathan's domain traversed, token granted
Ring of Gluttony cleared — Beelzebub's domain traversed, token granted
Ring of Sloth cleared — Belphegor's domain traversed, token granted
Ring of Wrath cleared — Satan's domain traversed, token granted
The bulk of hell traversed — Greed, Envy, Gluttony, Sloth, Wrath all behind the player
The player has moved through five expressions of sin from the inside — desire, envy, excess, stagnation, wrath no longer abstract
Each ring cleared brings the Orrery closer — the player can feel the direction even without seeing the destination
